content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Thorough review of all changes across 8 source files (br_health.rs, br_process.rs, project.rs, run.rs, success_reconciliation.rs, service.rs, cli.rs, .gitignore). The implementation is correct, well-tested (794 tests pass, clippy clean), and achieves all acceptance criteria: sync --import-only support via BrCommand::sync_import() and BrMutationAdapter::sync_import(), sync_if_dirty() convenience method, JSONL health check detecting conflict markers and malformed records, pre-operation safety checks in claim_bead_in_br/reconcile_success/handle_propose_new_bead, and comprehensive doc comments on sync lifecycle. The operation_lock (tokio::Mutex) correctly serializes mutation/flush/import operations, the crash-recovery path in claim_bead_in_br properly flushes recovered pending claims before re-attempting update, error cleanup in exec_tracked_mutation_locked no longer loses the original mutation error when marker cleanup fails, and the .gitignore correctly excludes the transient pending-mutations marker file. No bugs, safety problems, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
